page: Microsoft Azure D2s_v4 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DSv4 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor operating at 2.6 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 2 vCPUs derived from 1 physical core with 2 threads per core, supported by 8.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable for remote disk attachments.

Benchmark evaluations indicate moderate single-core capabilities alongside constrained multi-core and memory performance. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance of 1448.08 and Geekbench single-core score of 1255.0 fall within the average range. However, multi-core benchmarks show limitations, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 1906.49 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 1503.0, both placing in the bottom 10% of tested systems. Memory bandwidth is also low, measuring 13.68 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 11.04 GB/sec for large-block write operations.

Due to its resource profile, the D2s_v4 is best suited for lightweight general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, or development environments. It exhibits weak performance in data-intensive operations, as evidenced by a Passmark database score of 717.95 and a static web serving throughput of 1.97 GB/sec. The instance offers a cost-efficient entry point for applications that require dedicated CPU allocation but do not demand high memory bandwidth, parallel processing power, or local storage.
description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v4 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DSv4 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with a dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL x86_64 processor operating at 2.6 GHz, providing 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Performance benchmarks show average single-core execution, such as a Geekbench single-core score of 1255.0, but poor multi-core and memory bandwidth results. This server is qualitatively cost-effective for lightweight workloads, minor web serving, and development tasks that do not require intensive parallel processing or high-speed local disk access.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v4 is a general-purpose VM featuring 2 vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor, 8.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, offering average single-core and poor multi-core performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v4 is a general-purpose VM with 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and Premium Storage support, suited for lightweight workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly, general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors for lightweight single-threaded workloads and development environments.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB RAM.
No local storage included, but supports Premium Storage configurations.
Average single-core performance suitable for basic computing tasks.
Constrained multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities.
Appropriate for lightweight web serving, testing, and development.
